layout.title: Settings
layout.description: Manage your profile and account settings

profile.title: Profile information
profile.description: Update your name and email address

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Delete your account and all of its resources
deleteAccount.warningDescription: Please proceed with caution, this cannot be undone.

dialog.title: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
dialog.description: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will also be permanently deleted. Please enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.

password.title: Update password
password.description: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure

googleCalendar.title: Google Calendar
googleCalendar.description: Sync your events, projects, tasks, and to-do items to Google Calendar
googleCalendar.connectedInfo: Your events, projects, tasks, and to-do items with dates are automatically synced to your Google Calendar.

disconnectDialog.title: Disconnect Google Calendar?
disconnectDialog.description: This will remove all JosGen-created events from your Google Calendar and revoke access. You can reconnect at any time.

googleCalendar.notConnectedInfo: Connect your Google account to automatically sync your events, projects, tasks, and to-do items to Google Calendar. Only calendar event access is requested.

language.title: Change Language
language.description: Choose the display language for the application
